claims.summary: Categorical telemetry labels are insufficient without numeric confidence and delta evidence.
claims.disposition: Verify cadence_clarity_score, first-valid entropy, hybrid coherence, and maximum absolute delta remain available.

claims.summary: Connection-origin state and current telemetry must remain distinguishable across time.
claims.disposition: Verify first-valid and latest-valid evidence have separate ownership and reconnect reset semantics.

claims.summary: Cadence clarity can be compared with reported felt continuity without treating either as ground truth for the other.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded cadence-versus-felt continuity comparison through sandbox evidence.

claims.summary: Hybrid coherence decay can be measured without changing the telemetry schema.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded coherence and max-delta decay trace through sandbox evidence.

claims.summary: Changing telemetry nesting, schema, or wire ABI would alter the live compatibility contract.
claims.disposition: Hold telemetry schema and ABI changes behind exact Mike/operator approval.
